# `api.jobs.email.send`

> `POST /job/{jobDisplayId}/email` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.email.send(job_display_id: int, *, data: SendEmailRequest | dict) -> None
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs email send <job_display_id> [--data ...]
```

``POST /job/{jobDisplayId}/email``

## Request body — `SendEmailRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `to` | `Optional[list[str]]` | no | Recipient emails |
| `cc` | `Optional[list[str]]` | no | CC emails |
| `bcc` | `Optional[list[str]]` | no | BCC emails |
| `subject` | `Optional[str]` | no | Email subject |
| `body` | `Optional[str]` | no | Email body |
